summary: A single static talking-head clip of a CBP Border Patrol agent in uniform speaking to camera against a flat green geometric backdrop, with burned-in caption subtitles, stating zero illegal immigrants were released at the southwest border in six months. It is a plain spoken informational/deterrence PSA with no music, no cinematic editing, and no genre styling, so it does not fit youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: illegal immigrants into this country in the last six months; And when people know that if they cross the border illegally; And if you do, you're going to be apprehended; THE BORDER IS CLOSED
